Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 30 

CRTFD_AMRCN_INDN_ALSKN_NTV_CD 

LABEL: Certified American Indian or Alaska Native Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: “American Indian or Alaska Native” means any beneficiary defined at 25 USC 1603(13), 1603(28), or 
1679(a), or who has been determined eligible as an Indian, pursuant to 42 CFR § 136.12; i.e., a 
Certificate of Degree of Indian or Alaska Native
